Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets extract the traces sequences of activities for each case: Case 1: RA, VF, AE, RMI, VF, AD, SC, AC Case 2: RA, VF, AE, AD, SC, AC Case 3: RA, VF, AE, RMI, RMI, VF, AD, SC, AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The log shows a main sequence: RA VF AE then possibly a loop of RMI and VF maybe multiple RMI before VF, then AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 2: no RMIVF loop Case 1: one iteration: RMI then VF Case 3: two RMIs, then VF. So the loop part can have one or more RMI activities, followed by exactly one VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: loop operator * (A, B): execute A, then either exit or execute B then A again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: * (RMI, RMI) ... gives 1, 3, 5, RMIs. But in our log, we have 1 RMI Case 1 and 2 RMIs Case 3. So we need to allow any number >=1

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To get arbitrary number, we can use sequence: RMI, * (tau, RMI) to get one or more

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: after AE, there is an XOR choice: either go directly to AD, or do a block of one or more RMIs then VF then AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This fits all traces. Case 2: tau path, so RA, VF, AE, AD, SC, AC. Case 1: takes the RMI path with one RMI... Case 3: takes RMI path with two RMIs
